signup.success_no_email: Didn't receive an email? Check your spam folder or

step1.title: Welcome to Pathly
step1.paragraph1: We built Pathly because the standard ChatGPT UX for job applications frustrated us. The constant tab-switching, copy-pasting and endless prompt iteration... so we thought: there must be a better way!
step1.paragraph2: With Pathly we've created an AI workspace with an integrated Pomodoro timer, as well as coaching sessions and inspiration for volunteering and community.
step1.paragraph3: That's why we built Pathly and want to share it with you :)

step2.title: Quick Start Tips
step2.card_extension_desc: Scrape jobs directly from LinkedIn or StepStone into Pathly. (Extension coming soon — for now: Add Job via copy-paste)
step2.card_add_job_desc: Copy the text of a job posting and paste it into 'Add Job'. Pathly analyzes it automatically.
step2.card_search_desc: Search for matching positions via Job Search and add them to your queue with a single click.

step3.title: Your Application Cockpit
step3.description: In the Job Queue we help you tailor your CV and cover letter for each position and systematically increase your chances of success.

step4.title: Feedback
step4.description: We're constantly improving Pathly. If something is missing or you have a wish — I'd love to hear your feedback:

step5.title: Confirm Privacy
step5.description: Please read our privacy policy and confirm your consent.
step5.privacy_label: I have read the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and agree.
step5.ai_label: I consent to the processing of my data by <aiLink>AI services</aiLink>.

page.title: Your Career Profile
page.subtitle: The more Pathly knows about you, the better your applications.

profile.title: Personal Context
profile.description: This information helps the AI personalize your applications.

documents.title: My Documents
documents.description: Your CV and cover letters — used for CV matching, optimization and application creation.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.

ai_processing.title: AI Processing Policy
ai_processing.s1_body: We use Anthropic's Claude models to analyze your CV and generate cover letters. This processing is essential for the core functionality of Pathly.
ai_processing.s2_body: Text data from your CV and job descriptions is sent to the Anthropic API for processing. Anthropic does not train their models on your data (Enterprise/API agreement).
ai_processing.s3_body: The AI provides suggestions only. You always have the final review before any application is sent.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.s1_body: We use only essential cookies required for authentication and security (Supabase Auth). These cannot be disabled.
cookie_policy.s2_body: For this version of Pathly, we do not use third-party tracking cookies (like Google Analytics).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: Pathly is an automated job application assistant. We provide tools to help you manage and expedite your job search.
terms.s2_body: You agree to provide accurate information and not to misuse the service for spamming or illegal activities.
terms.s3_body: Pathly provides suggestions and automation but does not guarantee job offers. We are not liable for the outcome of your applications.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Learn, share and connect with the Pathly community.
community.skill_share_desc: Offer what you can, find what you need.
community.career_desc: Ask career questions and learn from the community.
community.entrepreneurship_desc: Connect with founders and share ideas.
community.create_desc: Start a community around any topic of your choice.
community.banner_text: The community is new. Be one of the first to contribute actively and shape its direction.

volunteering.title: Volunteering
volunteering.subtitle: Do good in your community. Find opportunities that suit you.
volunteering.search_placeholder: Search volunteering... e.g. homeless shelter, tutoring, animal welfare
volunteering.empty_search_hint: Try a different search term or remove filters.
volunteering.empty_none_hint: The scraper runs weekly. New listings appear automatically.
volunteering.vote_desc: Suggest new volunteering categories and vote for existing proposals.
volunteering.t1_text: At Berliner Tafel I learned that giving and receiving is not a one-way street. The gratitude of the people moved me deeply.
volunteering.t2_text: When a child speaks their first full sentence and beams with joy — that is a moment you never forget.
volunteering.t3_text: I realized: when I help others, I also help myself. Volunteering was my anchor during an uncertain time.
volunteering.t4_text: At the animal shelter I learned to take responsibility again. Animals don’t judge — they simply need you.

add_job_dialog.desc: Copy the full job description. Our AI extracts the requirements automatically.
add_job_dialog.tip: Tip: Include tasks, requirements and tech stack.
add_job_dialog.desc_placeholder: Paste the full job description here...

cv_optimizer.opt_step_4: Integrating keywords from the job posting
cv_optimizer.error_no_match: No CV match result found. Please complete the CV match step first.
cv_optimizer.error_timeout: The optimization took too long (>110 sec). Please try again — the AI is sometimes slower with large CVs.
cv_optimizer.no_cv_desc: Please upload and scan your initial CV first before optimizing it.
cv_optimizer.main_desc: We compare your {cv} with the {matchResults} and give you {suggestions} on which phrases will lead to {moreSuccess}.
cv_optimizer.metrics_desc: CVs with metrics achieve significantly better ATS scores. Assign numbers directly to your positions — the AI will integrate them into the matching bullet points.
cv_optimizer.qr_intro: Before we generate your personal QR code, here's a quick overview of why this step is worth it:
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_1_desc: A short video gives recruiters a more authentic picture of you than plain text. You show who you are.
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_2_desc: You immediately stand out from the crowd. Experience shows that personal video messages can increase the chance of an interview by up to 40%.
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_3_desc: Your video is securely hosted on EU servers (AWS Frankfurt). Recruiters can only watch the video (stream) — downloading or saving is technically blocked.
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_4_desc: You don't need to worry about anything. After exactly 14 days, your video will be completely and irreversibly deleted.

command_palette.placeholder: What would you like to do?
